V0002_01_00_00_0.text: There can be only one winner, and you're looking at him!

V0002_01_00_01_0.text: Let's see if you have the cards to challenge me.

V0002_01_00_03_0.text: I'll show this sniveling puppy that he's more bark than bite!

V0002_01_00_04_0.text: Every Duel I've fought has led up to THIS moment! The moment I finally take down Yugi Muto and regain my top Dueling status!

V0002_01_00_05_0.text: I will defeat you once and for all!

V0002_01_00_06_0.text: I don't believe in any of your destiny nonsense, is that clear?

V0002_01_00_06_1.text: The only thing I believe in is the power of my cards to take you down!

V0002_01_00_08_0.text: There can be only one winner, and you're looking at him!

V0002_01_00_09_0.text: If you're showing no mercy, I won't either, Mokuba!

V0002_01_00_10_0.text: You'll learn exactly why it's foolish to challenge me!

V0002_01_00_11_0.text: The quickest path to failure is to Duel against me.

V0002_01_00_12_0.text: Only a Duel can decide who's right and who's wrong.

V0002_01_00_13_0.text: You're not ready to compete on my level!

V0002_01_00_14_0.text: The very idea of you out-Dueling me is ridiculous, Noah!

V0002_01_00_15_0.text: The world you created is nothing compared to mine!

V0002_01_00_16_0.text:
Gozaburo and The Big Five!
You'll pay for what you've done!

V0002_01_00_17_0.text: All those years of hiding just so you could lose against me.

V0002_01_00_18_0.text: Defeating punks like you is a great way to start the day.

V0002_01_00_19_0.text: Just because you want to win doesn't mean you will!

V0002_01_00_20_0.text:
You made a big mistake, Dartz!
By making me your adversary!

V0002_01_00_21_0.text: All your tricks and schemes are nothing against Seto Kaiba!

V0002_01_00_22_0.text:
A Shadow Game?
What nonsense is that?

V0002_03_00_01_0.text: It's clearly obvious that my strategies are superior to yours.

V0002_05_00_00_0.text: Even the cards know which Duelist should win!

V0002_06_01_03_0.text: You think that'll work on me?

V0002_08_00_00_0.text: I activate the Spell - Soul Exchange!

V0002_08_00_01_1.text: The Trap Card - Crush Card Virus activates!

V0002_08_00_02_0.text: I activate my Spell - Monster Reborn!

V0002_08_00_03_1.text: The Trap Card - Deck Devastation Virus activates!

V0002_08_00_04_1.text: The Trap Card - Eradicator Epidemic Virus activates!

V0002_08_00_05_0.text: My Trap Card activates! Ring of Destruction!

V0002_08_00_06_0.text: I activate my Quick-Play Spell! Ring of Defense!

V0002_08_00_07_0.text: My Trap Card activates! Destruction Ring!

V0002_08_00_08_0.text: This is just the card I need to take you down.

V0002_08_00_11_0.text: If you didn't already realize how much better I am than you, you'll find out now! I activate Polymerization!

V0002_08_00_12_0.text: This card is the key to my victory!

V0002_08_00_13_0.text: Even the cards know which Duelist should win!

V0002_08_00_13_1.text: I activate the Spell Card, Lullaby of Obedience!

V0002_08_00_14_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Card of Demise!

V0002_08_00_15_0.text: I activate my Spell Card, Silent Doom!

V0002_08_00_16_0.text: The Quick-Play Spell, Rage with Eyes of Blue!

V0002_08_00_16_1.text: I banish my hand, field and Graveyard to summon Blue-Eyes!

V0002_08_00_17_0.text: With this, Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon can attack three times!

V0002_08_00_17_1.text: And you can't activate effects during these attacks!

V0002_08_00_18_0.text: The Spell Card, Bingo Machine, Go!!!!

V0002_08_00_18_1.text: I add the card you choose to my hand!

V0002_08_00_19_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Burst Stream of Destruction!

V0002_08_00_20_0.text: My Blue-Eyes will paralyze anyone with its glare!

V0002_08_00_20_1.text: The Quick-Play Spell, Majesty with Eyes of Blue!

V0002_08_00_21_0.text: I equip Beacon of White on Blue-Eyes to Special Summon it!

V0002_08_00_22_0.text:
I now activate my Trap!
Cloning!

V0002_08_00_23_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Interdimensional Matter Transporter!

V0002_08_00_24_0.text: Heh! You think you can avoid a fight?

V0002_08_00_24_1.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Final Attack Orders!

V0002_08_00_25_0.text: I'll rip the wings off your strategy!

V0002_08_00_25_1.text:
I activate my virus card!
Virus Cannon!

V0002_08_00_26_0.text: With this Trap, my Blue-Eyes becomes...

V0002_08_00_27_0.text: I activate a Trap from my Graveyard!

V0002_08_00_27_1.text: I Set this card on my field!

V0002_08_00_28_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
The Melody of Awakening Dragon!

V0002_08_00_29_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Dragon Revival Rhapsody!

V0002_08_00_30_0.text: I can use this Spell Card to summon higher Level monsters!

V0002_08_00_31_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
The Flute of Summoning Dragon!

V0002_08_00_31_1.text: By playing this flute,  Lord of D. Special Summons a Dragon!

V0002_08_00_32_0.text:
The Quick-Play Spell, Shrink!
It halves a monster's ATK!

V0002_08_00_33_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Dark Energy!

V0002_08_00_34_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Mesmeric Control!

V0002_08_00_35_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Spell Absorption!

V0002_08_00_36_0.text:
Hahahaha!
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Fist of Fate!

V0002_08_00_37_0.text: The Quick-Play Spell, Mystical Space Typhoon!

V0002_08_00_38_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Dark Core!

V0002_08_00_40_0.text: You can use Spell Card "Soul Exchange"'s effect as well.

V0002_08_00_41_0.text:
I activate my Spell!
Interdimensional Matter Forwarder!

V0002_08_00_43_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Ultimate Fusion!

V0002_08_00_44_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
A Wingbeat of Giant Dragon!

V0002_08_00_45_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Pot of Greed!

V0002_08_00_46_0.text: I built my Duel Tower upon the wreckage of history!

V0002_08_00_47_0.text:
Only the strong survive!
I activate Duel Tower's effect!

V0002_08_00_48_0.text: The only way I can move forward is by destroying the past!

V0002_08_00_49_0.text: It's now time you witness an Egyptian God!

V0002_08_00_49_1.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Soul Crossing!

V0002_08_00_50_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Soul Release!

V0002_08_00_51_0.text: I activate the Continuous Spell, Soul Absorption!

V0002_08_00_53_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Dimension Fusion!

V0002_08_00_54_0.text: This light will lead me to victory!

V0002_08_00_55_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Vision with Eyes of Blue!

V0002_08_00_56_0.text: Vision with Eyes of Blue's effect activates!

V0002_08_00_57_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Strength in Unity!

V0002_08_00_58_0.text: I activate Strength in Unity's effect!

V0002_08_00_59_0.text: I activate the Continuous Spell, Legacy of the Duelist!

V0002_08_00_60_0.text: I activate Legacy of the Duelist's effect!

V0002_08_00_61_0.text: This will give me the power to control my fate!

V0002_08_00_61_1.text: I activate the Ritual Spell, White Dragon Ritual!

V0002_08_00_62_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
The Breaking Ruin God!

V0002_08_00_62_1.text: You've never seen anything like this before!

V0002_08_00_63_0.text: I activate The Breaking Ruin God's effect from my Graveyard!

V0002_08_00_63_1.text:
Obelisk's power can't be stopped!
Hahahahaha!

V0002_08_00_64_0.text: The Spell Card, Roar of the Blue-Eyed Dragons!

V0002_08_00_65_0.text:
My Spell Card!
Wishes for Eyes of Blue!

V0002_08_00_66_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Mausoleum of White!

V0002_08_00_68_0.text: I activate the Trap, Gift of The Mystical Elf!

V0002_08_00_69_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Shadow Spell!

V0002_08_00_70_0.text:
I activate my Counter Trap!
Negate Attack!

V0002_08_00_71_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Soul Energy MAX!!!!

V0002_08_00_72_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Tyrant Wing!

V0002_08_00_73_0.text: I activate the Trap, Burst Breath!

V0002_08_00_74_0.text:
My Trap Card!
Magical Trick Mirror!

V0002_08_00_75_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Attack Guidance Armor!

V0002_08_00_76_0.text: I activate the Continuous Trap, Soul Demolition!

V0002_08_00_78_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
True Light!

V0002_08_00_80_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Majesty of the White Dragons!

V0002_08_00_81_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Dragon's Rage!

V0002_09_00_04_0.text: Chaos Emperor Dragon - Envoy of the End's effect activates!

V0002_09_00_04_1.text: Erase everything with Cemetery of Fire!

V0002_09_00_06_0.text: Vampire Lord feeds on your deck!

V0002_09_00_09_0.text: I use Kaibaman's effect to Special Summon Blue Eyes!

V0002_09_00_10_0.text: Doom Virus Dragon destroys monsters with 1500 or more ATK!

V0002_09_00_23_0.text: Dragon Spirit of White's effect activates!

V0002_09_00_24_0.text: I now negate your monster's effects!

V0002_09_00_25_0.text: I return Solid Dragon to my deck to bring a new Blue-Eyes!

V0002_09_00_26_0.text: I discard a card to activate The King of D.'s effect!

V0002_09_00_29_0.text: I activate Thunder Dragon's effect from my hand!

V0002_09_00_30_0.text: I activate Goddess of Sweet Revenge's effect from my hand!

V0002_09_00_30_1.text: You made me damage a rare card!

V0002_09_00_32_0.text: I activate Dictator of D.'s effect!

V0002_09_00_33_0.text: Peten the Dark Clown activates when it goes to the Grave!

V0002_09_00_34_0.text: Giant Germ's effect activates when it's destroyed in battle!

V0002_09_00_35_0.text: Neo Kaiser Sea Horse activates its effect!

V0002_09_00_36_0.text: I activate Dragon Master Magia's effect!

V0002_09_00_37_0.text: Blue-Eyes Jet Dragon activates its effect!

V0002_09_00_38_0.text: I activate Blue-Eyes Tyrant Dragon's effect!

V0002_09_00_39_0.text: Paladin of White Dragon activates its effect!

V0002_09_00_40_0.text: I activate Kaibaman the Legend's effect!

V0002_09_00_41_0.text: Maiden with Eyes of Blue activates her effect!

V0002_09_00_42_0.text: I activate Sage with Eyes of Blue's effect!

V0002_09_00_43_0.text: Priestess with Eyes of Blue activates her effect!

V0002_09_00_44_0.text: Protector with Eyes of Blue activates his effect!

V0002_09_00_45_0.text: I activate Master with Eyes of Blue's effect!

V0002_09_00_46_0.text: I activate Maiden of White's effect!

V0002_09_00_47_0.text: The White Stone of Legend's effect activates!

V0002_09_00_48_0.text: I activate The White Stone of Ancients's effect!

V0002_09_00_49_0.text: I activate Blue-Eyes Spirit Dragon's effect!

V0002_09_00_50_0.text: I activate Blue-Eyes Ultimate Spirit Dragon's effect!

V0002_09_00_51_0.text: I activate Indigo-Eyes Silver Dragon's effect!

V0002_09_00_52_0.text: Azure-Eyes Silver Dragon activates its effect!

V0002_09_00_53_0.text: I activate Spirit with Eyes of Blue's effect!

V0002_09_00_54_0.text: I activate Blue-Eyes Abyss Dragon's effect!

V0002_11_00_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Attack Position!

V0002_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0002_13_00_00_0.text: Not a single card can stand up to this!

V0002_13_00_00_1.text: I call on Blue-Eyes White Dragon!

V0002_13_00_01_0.text: Witness the incredible creature of unsurpassed power!

V0002_13_00_02_0.text: Prepare to cower before my Egyptian God!

V0002_13_00_02_1.text: An almighty creature that knows no equal!

V0002_13_00_07_0.text: I Special Summon Chaos Emperor Dragon - Envoy of the End!

V0002_13_00_08_0.text: I Xyz Summon Legendary Dragon of White!

V0002_13_00_09_0.text: It's like looking in the mirror! Here comes Kaibaman!

V0002_13_00_11_0.text: Only I can do what no other Duelist can do! Hahahahahaha!

V0002_13_00_13_0.text: I Special Summon Tyrant Burst Dragon!

V0002_13_00_15_0.text: My ultimate monster lets me summon this brilliant dragon!

V0002_13_00_24_0.text: A, B and C combine into ABC-Dragon Buster!

V0002_13_00_25_0.text: A thru Z join together into A-to-Z-Dragon Buster Cannon!

V0002_13_00_40_0.text: Brace yourself for my Battle Ox!

V0002_13_00_47_0.text: I Special Summon Rare Metal Dragon!

V0002_13_00_55_0.text:
Equip and combine!
Blue-Eyes Tyrant Dragon!

V0002_13_00_56_0.text:
Descend from the skies!
Paladin of White Dragon!

V0002_13_00_67_0.text:
Let's go!
Blue-Eyes Ultimate Spirit Dragon!

V0002_13_00_70_0.text:
Appear!
Spirit with Eyes of Blue!

V0002_13_00_71_0.text:
Emerge from the depths!
Blue-Eyes Abyss Dragon!

V0002_18_00_00_0.text: My monster attacks your Life Points directly!

V0002_18_00_01_0.text: My monster attacks your Life Points directly!

V0002_19_00_00_0.text: Blue-Eyes! Lay waste to your enemy!

V0002_19_00_01_0.text: Prepare for annihilation! Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, attack!

V0002_19_00_02_0.text: Obelisk! Crush the enemy and bring me victory!

V0002_19_00_09_0.text: Chaos Emperor Dragon - Envoy of the End attacks!

V0002_19_00_27_0.text:
Take this!
Blue-Eyes Solid Dragon! Attack!

V0002_19_00_39_0.text: If you want to end me, do it with your cards!

V0002_19_00_40_0.text: Just pray that a gourmet fish eats you!

V0002_19_00_60_0.text: Maiden with Eyes of Blue attacks!

V0002_19_00_61_0.text:
Sage with Eyes of Blue!
Attack!

V0002_19_00_62_0.text:
Priestess with Eyes of Blue!
Attack!

V0002_19_00_63_0.text:
Protector with Eyes of Blue!
Attack!

V0002_19_00_64_0.text:
Master with Eyes of Blue!
Attack!

V0002_19_00_66_0.text:
The White Stone of Legend!
Attack!

V0002_19_00_67_0.text:
The White Stone of Ancients!
Attack!

V0002_19_00_72_0.text: Attack, Spirit with Eyes of Blue!

V0002_21_00_03_0.text:
Do you know the surrender icon?
You should touch it.

V0002_21_00_04_0.text:
Give it your best shot.
Not that it will help you.

V0002_21_00_05_0.text: You won't get away with this...

V0002_26_00_01_0.text: Is that the best you got?

V0002_26_00_02_0.text: You'll have to do better than that!

V0002_28_00_00_1.text: You could never defeat a Duelist with talent!

V0002_28_00_01_0.text: You're a third-rate Duelist with a fourth-rate Deck!

V0002_28_00_03_0.text: Out-Dueling Joey Wheeler is no cause for celebration. I could've beaten him blindfolded.

V0002_28_00_04_0.text: Now YOU will call ME the King of Games!

V0002_28_00_05_0.text: You believed that destiny would lead you to victory.

V0002_28_00_05_1.text: But I just proved that destiny is nothing but a joke!

V0002_28_00_06_0.text: During a Duel, there are no friends or family!

V0002_28_00_07_0.text:
You really thought you'd win?
You can't be serious!

V0002_28_00_08_0.text:
There's no glory in crushing fools like you.
But it is fun.

V0002_28_00_09_0.text: It's easier to build a world than a victory against me!

V0002_28_00_10_0.text: Defeating a Deck as powerful as yours proves how great I am!

V0002_28_00_11_0.text: I get the pleasure of firing you all over again!

V0002_28_00_12_0.text:
You don't control the future.
I do!

V0002_28_00_13_0.text:
You say you're the chosen one?
Who chose you? A clown?

V0002_28_00_14_0.text: Stop blaming the whole world for your failures!

V0002_28_00_15_0.text:
My duty is to protect my brother!
And I won't fail like you!

V0002_28_00_16_0.text: Mokuba and I know how rough people can be.

V0002_28_00_16_1.text: But none of them could stop us from reaching the top!

V0002_28_00_17_0.text: Since I run a successful company, I'd be jealous of me too!

V0002_28_00_18_0.text:
Everyone has problems.
But you don't hear me whining!

V0002_29_00_00_1.text: But I somehow let it slip away...

V0002_29_00_01_0.text: No! There must be some mistake!

V0002_29_00_03_0.text: Heh. So this is what it feels like to be the worst Duelist in the world.

V0002_29_00_05_0.text: Yugi, I was willing to risk everything to win. But I still couldn't pull it off...

V0002_29_00_06_0.text: Heh, you made a good move. I guess there's a first time for everything.

V0002_29_00_08_0.text:
This can't be real...
I lost...

V0002_29_00_10_0.text:
My strategies were flawless...
But I still lost...

V0002_29_00_11_0.text:
How could this happen...
I had the perfect hand...

V0002_29_00_12_0.text: Go ahead and make your big victory speech!

V0002_29_00_13_0.text: I'll get you for this, Noah...

V0002_30_00_00_0.text: You're learning the hard way that you have no business being here.

V0002_30_00_01_0.text: I don't have time for amateurs! Surrender already!

V0002_30_00_02_0.text: Are you actually trying to think? Is this some lame attempt at a strategy?

V0002_33_00_01_0.text: There's only one champion, and that's me!

V0002_34_00_00_0.text: I've never backed down from a challenge and I don't plan to start today!

V0002_34_00_01_0.text: Heh heh... You're a Duelist worth Dueling... and defeating!

V0002_34_00_02_0.text: I execute my strategies perfectly, something you can never do!

V0002_34_00_03_0.text: Nnng... If you think I'm going to lose, you better check yourself into an insane asylum.

V0002_34_00_04_0.text: Heh, you made a good move. I guess there's a first time for everything.

V0002_34_00_05_0.text: Play your next card! Not that it'll be around for long...

V0002_34_00_06_0.text: Heh... Even if you have a good card, it's worthless if I destroy it!

V0002_34_00_07_0.text: With these cards in my hand, there's no way I'll lose!

V0002_34_00_08_0.text: That's nothing special. I have 36 copies of that card!

V0002_34_00_09_0.text: Nothing will save you from humiliation!

V0002_34_00_10_0.text: Only the strongest Duelist can wield the power of a god!

V0002_36_00_05_0.text: Where's your bond of friendship to help you now, Yugi?

V0002_36_00_06_0.text: Finish this Duel for me, Mokuba.

V0002_37_00_00_0.text: The ultimate Fusion Summon for the Ultimate Dragon!

V0002_51_00_00_0.text: You're in for a rough time!
